title: Squirrel Removal in Longwood, Bronx | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Longwood, Bronx. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving the Longwood community. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Squirrels invading your Longwood home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout the Longwood neighborhood of the Bronx. Our licensed technicians use humane, effective methods to safely remove squirrels and prevent future infestations in this vibrant South Bronx community.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Longwood residents, we understand the unique pest challenges faced by homes near Southern Boulevard and the area's pre-war apartment buildings. Our team provides fast response times, transparent pricing, and guaranteed results to protect your property from squirrel damage.
localContext: Longwood's tree-lined streets and mix of residential buildings create ideal conditions for squirrel activity, particularly during fall and winter months when they seek warm attics and wall voids. From the historic homes near St. Mary's Park to the apartment complexes along Prospect Avenue, we've helped countless Longwood property owners reclaim their spaces from persistent squirrel problems.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Longwood typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Longwood homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter through roof vents, soffit gaps, chimney openings, and damaged fascia boards. In Longwood's older buildings, deteriorated mortar and architectural gaps provide easy access points. Our team identifies and seals all potential entry points during the removal process.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, live-catch trapping methods that comply with New York wildlife regulations. Squirrels are safely relocated away from your property, and we never use harmful poisons or lethal traps that could endanger other wildlife or pets.

faqs.question: How long does squirrel removal take in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Longwood are completed within 3-7 days, though complex infestations may take up to two weeks. This includes trapping, exclusion work, and cleanup. We'll provide a specific timeline after inspecting your property and assessing the scope of the infestation.
